license.notes: Work of the US government is in the public domain in the United States per 17 U.S.C. § 105. State and local government works generally follow the same convention but may vary; consult the specific issuer for definitive terms.

notes: Auto-generated bulk metadata. Enrich title/description/relations as needed.

current_extraction.notes: Structured the FedRAMP LI-SaaS baseline into <dirname>-controls.{csv,json}. 66 controls (55 base + 11 enhancements). LI-SaaS uses a divergent template from High/Moderate/Low (controls appear as bold inline anchors, not ## headings; control name on a preceding line; no (L)(M)(H) baseline annotation), so it has its own parser. Schema matches the H/M/L outputs for joinability: control_id, control_name, is_enhancement, parent_control_id, baseline=LI-SaaS, baseline_levels=LI-SaaS, control_text, fedramp_assignments. Note: control_text retains the '[Excluded from FedRAMP Tailored for LI-SaaS]' markers verbatim from the source so consumers can distinguish included vs excluded sub-parts.
